---
title: "Une histoire de connectivité : propagation des épidémies et des feux de forêts"
author: "Café des Sciences --- Quentin Giton"
subtitle: |
  ::: {.columns}
  ::: {.column width=50%}
  ![](medias/images/covid.jpg){width=73%}
  :::

  ::: {.column width=50%}
  ![](medias/images/feux.jpeg)
  :::
  :::
format: 
    revealjs: 
        theme: [default, theme.scss]
        highlight-style: github 
        css: styles.css
        slide-number: true
        incremental: false
        auto-play-media: false
        embed-resources: false
        center: false
        auto-stretch: false
toc: false
number-sections: false
---

## Les épidémies
